meta.title: StoreKite — AI-Powered E-Commerce Store Builder
meta.description: We build complete AI-powered WooCommerce stores with server-side tracking, headless Nuxt frontend, and AI content pipeline. Catch every conversion signal.

problem.label: The problem
problem.subtitle: Three invisible leaks drain your ad budget every day. Most WooCommerce stores have all three.

cards.title: Tracking gap
cards.desc: iPhone purchases vanish before reaching Meta ML — your campaigns optimise on a fraction of actual buyers.

cards.title: iOS blind spot
cards.desc: Over a third of Polish internet users run adblockers. Every one of them is invisible to Google Ads' Smart Bidding.

cards.title: PageSpeed jump
cards.desc: Typical WooCommerce scores 40–60 on mobile. You pay 20–40% more per click than you should.

problem.savingsDesc: Estimated monthly loss for a store spending €10k/month on ads — from tracking gaps alone.

services.label: What we build
services.title: Three layers. One complete store.
services.subtitle: StoreKite wraps your WooCommerce with infrastructure that makes your store faster, smarter, and trackable.

tracking.name: Tracking
tracking.title: GA4 + GTM done right
tracking.description: Server-side tagging runs on our infrastructure. iOS, adblockers, GDPR — none of them touch your conversion data.

performance.name: Performance
performance.title: PageSpeed 95+ mobile
performance.description: Nuxt 3 headless frontend on Vercel edge. Cheaper clicks, better Quality Score, faster checkout.

ai.name: AI Content
ai.title: Blog on autopilot
ai.description: SEO articles, social drafts, email campaigns — AI-generated, you approve before publishing.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.title: From zero to live in 4–8 weeks.
timeline.subtitle: Clear milestones, no surprises. You know exactly where we are at every step.

weeks.title: Discovery & Setup
weeks.description: Store audit, design system, WordPress backend setup, GA4/GTM configuration, project architecture.

weeks.title: Build & Integrate
weeks.description: Nuxt 3 frontend development, product catalog, checkout flow, payment integration, server-side tracking.

weeks.title: AI & Content Layer
weeks.description: AI content pipeline setup, blog automation, social media integration, email flows in Klaviyo.

weeks.title: Launch & Optimize
weeks.description: QA testing, performance optimization, DNS migration, monitoring setup, handover documentation.

roi.label: ROI Calculator
roi.title: See what better tracking is worth.
roi.subtitle: Enter your monthly revenue. We'll show the projected impact of proper attribution and AI content.
roi.trackingDesc: Better ML signal → smarter ad spend → more attributed conversions
roi.contentDesc: SEO blog traffic + email automation → organic revenue growth
roi.disclaimer: * Projections based on industry benchmarks. Tracking uplift assumes 15-25% improvement in attribution leading to better ad optimization. Content uplift assumes 3-5% organic revenue growth from consistent SEO content. Individual results vary.

testimonial.label: Social proof
testimonial.quote: I built StoreKite for my own store first. Then decided to offer it to others. Every tool in this stack is something I built, tested on my own ad budget, and rely on myself.
testimonial.name: Szymon Bubała

items.a: We build complete AI-powered WooCommerce stores — headless Nuxt 3 frontend, automated GA4/GTM tracking, AI content pipeline (blog, social, email), and MCP-powered WordPress management. It's a full store build, not just tracking consulting.

items.q: How is this different from a regular agency?
items.a: Regular agencies take 3–6 months and skip tracking infrastructure. We deliver in 4–8 weeks with enterprise-grade server-side tracking, AI content automation, and MCP-powered WordPress management built in from day one.

items.q: Do I need to migrate from my current store?
items.a: Yes — we build a new headless frontend on Nuxt 3 while keeping your WooCommerce backend. Your products, orders, and customers stay in WordPress. The frontend gets a complete rebuild for performance and tracking.
We handle 301 redirects, canonical URLs, structured data, and sitemap generation. Most stores see improved rankings within weeks thanks to Core Web Vitals improvements.

items.q: How many projects do you take per year?
items.a: 5–8 projects maximum. Each store gets dedicated attention — no assembly line, no junior devs. When we're full, we're full.

items.q: What does the AI content pipeline actually do?
items.a: It generates SEO blog articles, social media drafts, and email campaigns based on your products and brand voice. You review and approve before publishing. It's not auto-posting garbage — it's AI-assisted content creation with human oversight.

cta.title: Ready to build your AI store?
cta.subtitle: 30-minute call. We'll map out your store build — tech stack, AI content pipeline, tracking setup, timeline and price.
cta.fine: No commitment · You keep everything we build
